hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['tool_input']['file_path'])" | grep -qE "Source.*\.(h|cpp)$" && export DOTNET_MULTILEVEL_LOOKUP=0 && export DOTNET_ROLL_FORWARD=LatestMajor && export UE_DOTNET_DIR='/c/Program Files/Epic Games/UE_5.7/Engine/Binaries/ThirdParty/DotNet/8.0.412/win-x64' && export PATH="$UE_DOTNET_DIR:$PATH" && export DOTNET_ROOT="$UE_DOTNET_DIR" && dotnet '/c/Program Files/Epic Games/UE_5.7/Engine/Binaries/DotNET/UnrealBuildTool/UnrealBuildTool.dll' -projectfiles -project='C:/dev/games-unreal/Quake/Quake.uproject' -game -engine -VSCode 2>/dev/null || true
